items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of booking data obfuscation for non-owners, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms the implementation or behavior of this feature. The linked use case outlines a booking process but does not address the specific requirement of data obfuscation for non-owners, leading to an inconclusive status. Additionally, prior steps do not provide any relevant evidence to support this validation.
